channel.title: Lores on Dark Pawns
channel.description: Recent content in Lores on Dark Pawns

item.title: World Creation — The Letter of Friar Drake
item.description:
Background — World Lore

Source: darkpawns.com/background.html
Author: R.E. Paret (Frontline)
Preserved from Wayback Machine capture

The gods have always been, and always will be. And having free will, given to them by Chaos, they created their own and brought forth likenesses, who strive to become as gods, and join them in their omnipotence.

Like a great game of chess, the world has become a board filled with bishops and kings, stately queens, white knights and dark pawns striving to rise through the ranks into godhood.
